text.tspan: Tx Descriptor Queue for each Virtual Target
Tx Buffer for each Virtual Target
A single physical SRAM implements a number of logically-separate FIFOs, with the inclusive bounds of each
Each FIFO has programmable `min` and `max` values and operates as a circular buffer, employing a read pointer
(`rptr`) and a write pointer (`wptr`). A `full` indicator differentiates between the `FIFO full` and `FIFO empty`
A third pointer (`pptr`) is used for prefetching read data from the FIFO to ensure that this shared message buffer
remains responsive even when there is a lot of traffic.
